caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario, likely part of a training exercise for healthcare professionals. Three individuals dressed in blue surgical gowns and masks are gathered around a patient mannequin covered with sterile drapes. The person on the right is holding a medical instrument, possibly preparing to perform a procedure, while the other two appear to be assisting or observing. The setting resembles an operating room, complete with medical equipment and supplies laid out on the table. The atmosphere suggests a focused and educational environment, aimed at enhancing clinical skills and teamwork among the participants. The "Sim Week" logo indicates that this is part of a structured simulation week designed for medical education.
